Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: Get ready for HK51 by watching Mississippi native Adrian Miles' last HK fight, an epic battle with UFC alum Rodney Wallace. He's getting ready to face Miles Anstead on October 14!

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 47 continues with some action packed MMA! This episode features a matchup between amateur debut Austin Russell challenging Reuben Lopez. Following is the exciting pro matchup Noah Ali vs. Lyndon Whitlock, jammed with lots of rounds and great moves. You do not want to miss it!

Video.title: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 3

Bodog Fight - Hitomi Akano v. Keiko Tamai

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Video.grandparentTitle: Finish of the Day - Colton Cronkite v. Todd Vatcher - HKFC

UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Abdalla Ibrahim vs. Dionicio Gustavo

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Dimitrios Triantafyllis vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Dimitrios Triantafyllis vs. Luiz Rocha

KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Dimitrios Triantafyllis vs. Luiz Rocha

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.
